digest_entry.summary: ⚠️ Conflict detected: Noah's 6-month checkup (Tue Jun 23, 10:15 AM) overlaps your work meeting at 10:00 AM.
suggested_actions: Move the checkup to a different time slot

parsed.rationale: No outbound action is needed — this is a digest-only flag surfacing a calendar conflict between Noah's 6-month checkup and a work meeting on Jun 23 so the parent can decide how to resolve it.
